items.caption: A large, modern courthouse with a prominent circular entrance, situated in salt lake city. the building is white with large windows and a flagpole on the left side. in front of the courthouse, there is a crowd of people, some of whom are seated on steps, while others stand or sit on the ground. a black car is parked on the street in front of the building. the sky is partly cloudy, and the photo appears to be taken during the day.
